violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC stated unit was last used yesterday. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC stated owner finalizing labels for prepackaged items. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
Handwashing sink in the kitchen area is missing proper handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Inspector observed prep table blocking kitchen access to hand sink in front service area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Desserts (cake) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the back kitchen area and walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

A cup is being used as scoops in a container of food in the walk-in cooler. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. PIC removed cup. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Knives are stored on an unclean surface (3 bay sink wooden support beam) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. Grill 2. Prep Unit 3. All chest freezers 4. Ansul system Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The floor in the 3 bay sink area is in poor repair. Inspector observed floor ties missing exposing wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Inspector observed hand sink in front area being blocked by wooden door panel. Per interview with Owner contractor has been contacted and will be completed next week. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Deli meats and chicken was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Cake packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Knives are stored on an unclean surface (3 bay sink support beam) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Chest freezer located in the back area was not in good repair, observed top inside coating peeling with missing pieces throughout. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Grill 2. Prep units 3. Chest Freezer 4. Ansul System Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The floor in the 3 bay sink area is in poor repair. Floor tiles missing exposing wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Inspector observed hand sink in front area being blocked by wooden door panel. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (tres leche cake) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Empanadas observed held at 110-118 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Shredded chicken was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Tres leche cake packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Knives are stored behind support shelves (above 3 bay sink) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The cutting boards on prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
Chest freezer located in the back area was not in good repair, observed top inside coating peeling with missing pieces throughout. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris.1. Grill 2. Panini press's3. Ice machine 4. Fryers 5. Prep units6. Chest freezer gaskets7. Ansul systemPIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The area around the dumpster was observed with an accumulation of debris and food. Refuse areas must be kept free of clutter and litter to help prevent pest harborage. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The floor in the 3 bay sink area is in poor repair. Floor tiles missing exposing wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The establishment is lacking a food allergen statement. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a prep table and mop bucket. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood/ventilation unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023
The plumbing to the handsink is in poor repair. Pipe observed cut. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023
The floor in the 3 bay sink area is in poor repair. Floor tiles missing exposing wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The floors, grill area and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023
